title: Add base64-codec utility with streaming support
description: Create src/utils/base64-codec.ts with base64 encode/decode streaming support using Node.js Transform streams, plus co-located unit tests in src/utils/base64-codec.test.ts
existing_patterns: src/utils/chunk.ts — single-function utility with typed params and error handling
src/utils/chunk.test.ts — vitest describe/it/expect test pattern with edge cases
src/utils/base64.ts — existing base64 encode/decode using Buffer (plain, non-streaming)
